steps.title: Spot Miguel’s hope
steps.content: The passage notes Miguel’s hope to meet the sisters and also to meet their father, the poet, at Mamá’s house.

steps.title: Match the hope to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D states that Miguel expects to be introduced to both the sisters and their father, matching that hope.
The other three options describe motives—being taught by the sisters, seeking mentorship from their father, or sharing his poems—that are never mentioned as his reason for coming.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
